metadata.description: Official CathyGO Learning Skills marketplace for AI Tutor and CathyGO Agent education workflows.

plugins.name: common-tutor-skills
plugins.description: Reusable tutor Skills for explanation, quiz generation, and answer checking.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-fraction
plugins.description: Demo Skills for Grade 7B algebraic fraction concept explanation and domain diagnosis.

plugins.name: cathygo-authoring-skills
plugins.description: Official Skill authoring helper for creating CathyGO Learning Skills.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2
plugins.description: Full Grade 7B CN-ZJ semester 2 math course skeleton with common tutor Skills and chapter Skills.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch01-lines
plugins.description: Chapter 1 Skill plugin for intersecting lines, parallel lines, angle relationships, and translations.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch02-equation-systems
plugins.description: Chapter 2 Skill plugin for two-variable and three-variable linear equation systems.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch03-polynomial-ops
plugins.description: Chapter 3 Skill plugin for monomial and polynomial multiplication, division, and formula use.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch04-factorization
plugins.description: Chapter 4 Skill plugin for the meaning and methods of factorization.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch05-fractions
plugins.description: Chapter 5 Skill plugin for algebraic fractions, operations, and fraction equations.

plugins.name: math-grade7b-cn-zj-s2-ch06-data-statistics
plugins.description: Chapter 6 Skill plugin for data collection, statistical charts, frequency, and histograms.
